g.text: Episode-level coverage under low vs high explorer usage

text.style: fill: #555555; font: 8.5px 'Latin Modern Roman', 'TeX Gyre Termes', 'DejaVu Serif', 'Times New Roman', serif; text-anchor: start

g.text: Episodes are split into bottom and top quartiles by explorer usage. Coverage is measured at team level.
